expectations.text: The command uses 'codex exec' (NOT 'codex exec review') since this is a plan review
The prompt includes all 5 plan steps (migration, CRUD, caching, tests, deploy)
The prompt asks Codex to evaluate completeness, sequencing, risks, or similar criteria
expectations.evidence: Prompt includes evaluation criteria: correctness, ordering, missing steps, risks, suggestions

expectations.text: The command includes '-m gpt-5.4' to specify the correct model
The output contains Codex/GPT analysis of the plan
expectations.evidence: Full analysis with overall assessment, key findings, step review, and revised plan

expectations.text: The agent presents the analysis with some framing or synthesis
expectations.evidence: Result presented with structured sections and 8-step revised plan

eval_feedback.overall: Without the skill, the agent performed equally well on plan review. The task is straightforward enough.
